title: United Kingdom - Bristol Bath Gloucester Swindon Weston-super-Mare - Let’s connect the country !

messages.author: pil
messages.text: https://www.facebook.com/groups/meshcoresw We started to install some repeaters around Bristol. We think we can easly connect Bristol, Bath, Gloucester, Swindon, and Weston-super-Mare
messages.content_html: https://www.facebook.com/groups/meshcoresw We started to install some repeaters around Bristol. We think we can easly connect Bristol, Bath, Gloucester, Swindon, and Weston-super-Mare
embeds_html:
Log in or sign up to view
See posts, photos and more on Facebook.

messages.author: pil
messages.text: Thank you for joining ! We had quite a few members joining.
messages.content_html: Thank you for joining ! We had quite a few members joining.

messages.author: MrXfd
messages.content_html: Anything around Oxford going on?
messages.reactions_html: 1

messages.author: mikecsh
messages.text: I've added a loft-based repeater in Wolvercote, and I see there's a room server and repeater up near Shotover, and others in Nuneham Courtney and Stanton Harcourt
messages.content_html: I've added a loft-based repeater in Wolvercote, and I see there's a room server and repeater up near Shotover, and others in Nuneham Courtney and Stanton Harcourt
messages.reactions_html: 1
messages.reply_html:
MrXfd
Anything around Oxford going on?

messages.author: MrXfd
messages.text: Hey Mike! Yep I 've seen your repeater and the other ones. I've just set up a repeater in Eynsham doesn't seem to show up on the map though. It's in a flat, no attic can't seem to be able to catch yours.
messages.content_html: Hey Mike! Yep I 've seen your repeater and the other ones. I've just set up a repeater in Eynsham doesn't seem to show up on the map though. It's in a flat, no attic can't seem to be able to catch yours.

messages.author: mikecsh
messages.text: Ah nice, I haven't seen yours yet but looks like a clean line of sight to Eynsham..
messages.content_html: Ah nice, I haven't seen yours yet but looks like a clean line of sight to Eynsham..
messages.reactions_html: 1
messages.reply_html:
MrXfd
Hey Mike! Yep I 've seen your repeater and the other ones. I've just set up a repeater in Eynsham doesn't seem to show up on the map though. It's in a flat, no attic can't seem to be able to catch yours.

messages.author: MrXfd
messages.text: Yeah haven't been able to catch yours either. Looks like the signal is dying out quite rapidly with distance. But I was able to ping it as I was passing by in Oxford North and Woodstock road the other day.
messages.content_html: Yeah haven't been able to catch yours either. Looks like the signal is dying out quite rapidly with distance. But I was able to ping it as I was passing by in Oxford North and Woodstock road the other day.

messages.author: Tim R
messages.text: Hello! I've been visiting Bath this week, and have been trying to hit any nearby Meshcore repeaters from my hotel, but I think there are too many hills in the way - I've realised it sort of sits in a valley. I'm down this way from time to time.
messages.content_html: Hello! I've been visiting Bath this week, and have been trying to hit any nearby Meshcore repeaters from my hotel, but I think there are too many hills in the way - I've realised it sort of sits in a valley. I'm down this way from time to time.

messages.author: Shonky
messages.text: Can’t be as bad as where I used to live in Sheffield, right by the River (or rather Trickle) Sheaf. Literally a VHF+ black hole.
messages.content_html: Can’t be as bad as where I used to live in Sheffield, right by the River (or rather Trickle) Sheaf. Literally a VHF+ black hole.

messages.author: MrXfd
messages.text: I sometimes catch lost packets when I go outside but haven't been able to ping or text anyone.
messages.content_html: I sometimes catch lost packets when I go outside but haven't been able to ping or text anyone.
